_comment: Auto-pinhole (#173) for deconz:zigbee — the native deCONZ REST+websocket API consumed by Home Assistant's deconz integration. No MQTT. Per ADR-COM-0006 deconz is in iotCloud and HA in srvHome, so this is a CROSS-zone pinhole srvHome->iotCloud (allowed: iotCloud.pinhole-allowed-from includes srvHome). HA uses explicit IP -> unicast, no multicast relay.
